productDisplayName: Franco Leone Men Brown Formal Shoes
description: Cast a timeless impression with this pair of franco leone loafers. Give your formal wear a twist of fashion with this leather shoe and revel in the comfort of easy fashion. Upper Leather upper with a rugged stitch finish for absolute comfort and style Slip-on style for ease of wear Concealed elasticated gussets on the sides of the tongue for a customised Fit Midsole Leather footbed ergonomically curved for all-day comfort Outsole Durable rubber outsole with oval and round lugs strategically placed on the forefoot and midfoot, with a raised textured heel for absolute grip on smooth surfaces Curved midfoot and raised heel for ergonomic comfort and style Shoe care Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Use a branded leather conditioner to maintain shoe shine Do not store in direct sunlight
